UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2006, DEFAULT PROVE-UP IN SCD. GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. DEPT. 218, COMM. SUE KAPLAN, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, CSR: C. SAUCEDA.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROTHERS' GRAPHIC ARTS,INC.,DBA LADYBUG PRINTING DARREL BROTHERS $37,967.20 PRINCIPAL, $2,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,300.00 INTEREST, $380.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $42,147.70, AND LEASED EQUIPMENT LISTED ON THE JUDGMENT, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-24-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-10-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: C. Sauceda.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live witness is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Brothers' Graphics Arts, Inc. dba Ladybug Printing and Darrel Brothers as follows:
Principal $37,967.20
Prejudgment Interest $1,300.00
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $380.50, for a total of $42,147.70
Judgment signed in open court.
